ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the venue */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits */,
  "total_mileage" INTEGER /* Total mileage accumulated by visiting teams */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the venue */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) */,
  "venue_version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "league" TEXT /* League or division the team belongs to */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being rated */,
  "rating_score" TEXT /* Score of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_comment" TEXT /* User's comment on the rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_venue_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue visited */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage traveled by the team to reach the venue */,
  "event_result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_venue_visits_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_venue_visits_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance activity occurred */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "maintenance_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor responsible for the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_maintenance_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being booked */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., match, training) */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in hours */,
  "organizer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_bookings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_bookings_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_travel_logs" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel log entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team traveling */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination venue */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage traveled */,
  "travel_mode" TEXT /* Mode of travel (e.g., bus, plane) */,
  "travel_cost" REAL /* Cost of the travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_travel_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the event */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the event */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the event */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average price of tickets for the event */,
  "event_feedback_score" TEXT /* Average feedback score for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES venue_bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., seating area, parking) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "facility_status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_facilities_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the feedback was given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response to the feedback (e.g., pending, addressed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, staff, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
